commands.review_summary:
The PR changes plugin manifest trust validation so ClawHub installs from official, community, and private channels can be marked trusted official installs when package metadata matches the official catalog, and adds registry tests plus a repro script.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +89, Other +212. Total +303 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: the MS Teams official catalog entry has only npmSpec, while the current ClawHub trust predicate still requires officialInstall?.clawhubSpec before the changed channel check runs. I did not run the reported container path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The blocker is a security-sensitive trust/provenance decision, not a safe automated repair on this branch.

target.title: fix: trust all ClawHub channel types when package matches official catalog
target.body:
$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

Fixes issue #92516: Containerized/self-hosted deploys can't use externalized channel plugins from ClawHub because trust was gated to only official channel.

This PR modifies the trust validation to accept all ClawHub channel types (official, community, private) when the package matches the official external plugin catalog, enabling self-hosted deployments to use externalized channel plugins like msteams.

## Changes

- **src/plugins/manifest-registry.ts**: Modified  to trust ClawHub installs from all channel types (official/community/private) when the package matches the official catalog
- **src/plugins/manifest-registry.test.ts**: Added test coverage for all three ClawHub channel types
- **scripts/repro/issue-92516-clawhub-trust.mts**: Added reproduction script to verify the fix

## Verification

- ✅ All existing manifest-registry tests pass (69 tests)
- ✅ New test case validates all three ClawHub channel types are trusted
- ✅ Reproduction script confirms fix works for official, community, and private channels
- ✅ Related ClawHub tests pass

## Before/After

**Before fix**: Only  was trusted
**After fix**: All ClawHub channels (official/community/private) are trusted when the package matches the official catalog

This maintains security through official catalog validation while enabling self-hosted deployments to use ClawHub channel plugins regardless of channel type.

Fixes #92516
EOF
)
target.author: wangmiao0668000666
